CRAN release checklist for depictr

Source: CRAN-RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md

A short, practical checklist for the first CRAN submission. Items marked [done] are already in place in this repository; the rest need a networked machine with a full R toolchain.

Before submitting

  • [done] DESCRIPTION complete: Title, Description, Authors@R (aut, cre), License (MIT + file LICENSE), URL, BugReports, Language: en-GB.
  • [done] NAMESPACE, all man/*.Rd, and NEWS.md generated and current.
  • [done] Every exported function has a runnable example; heavy back-ends (lme4, broom, simr) are in Suggests and used conditionally.
  • [done] Tests (testthat, edition 3) and six vignettes build offline.
  • [done] cran-comments.md drafted.

Submitting

After acceptance

Repository note

This package currently lives in the frequentist_bayesian_plot repository for historical reasons. Rename it to depictr on GitHub (Settings -> rename) so the package URLs (https://github.com/pablobernabeu/depictr) resolve; renaming preserves history and stars.

On this page

Developed by Pablo Bernabeu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
